Stub functions for initializing and cleaning up BLE application state.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that declares two functions related to Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) application state management. The function [`ble_init_app_state`](<#ble_init_app_state>) is intended to initialize the application state for a BLE application, although its implementation is currently empty. Similarly, the function [`ble_app_cleanup`](<#ble_app_cleanup>) is meant to perform cleanup operations for the BLE application, but it also lacks an implementation. The file uses the `#pragma once` directive to prevent multiple inclusions of the header file during compilation.
